_consolidated_into_parent.note: This Phase-2 era patient file represented a separate-repo upload of the ct2-int8 variant. With the 2026-04-21 WindyWord consolidation, all variants (safetensors/, ct2-int8/, onnx/, onnx-int8/) live as subfolders inside a single parent repo. This patient file is preserved for historical chronicle but is no longer the canonical record for this variant — see WindyWord/listen-windy-core (subfolder ct2-int8/).
